laws.title: Lack of Keyboard Navigation Support
laws.description: Some interactive elements are inaccessible via keyboard navigation.
laws.remediation: Ensure all interactive elements can be accessed and controlled using keyboard inputs.

laws.title: Inadequate Alt Text for Images
laws.description: Certain video thumbnails and images lack descriptive alt text.
laws.remediation: Provide meaningful alt text for all images to enhance screen reader accessibility.

laws.title: Color Contrast Issues
laws.description: Certain text elements do not have sufficient color contrast, affecting readability.
laws.remediation: Review and adjust color combinations to ensure adequate contrast ratios.

laws.title: Absence of ARIA Labels
laws.description: Important interactive components lack ARIA labels for assistive technologies.
laws.remediation: Implement ARIA labels on all interactive and significant elements.

laws.title: Video Captioning and Descriptions
laws.description: Many videos do not provide captions or descriptions for accessibility.
laws.remediation: Encourage the use of captions and descriptions for all video content to enhance accessibility.
